category_sources: source_facts.description says jaq is a jq clone focused on correctness, speed, and simplicity; official GitHub About says the same.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jaq; official GitHub repository is 01mf02/jaq.
docs_sources: Official jaq manual documents CLI, jq core language, standard library, and differences from jq; official repository README provides project overview.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/01mf02/jaq, so repo was left null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub topics identify jq compatibility, JSON querying, Rust implementation, and CLI use.
